name: Ata

skills.name: Child of the Sea
skills.description:
His lost Health is preserved in a temporary Health buffer. Dealing damage converts buffered Health into actual Health.
After a while, the buffered Health will begin to gradually diminish.
His Basic Attacks deal extra damage.

skills.name: Wavewalking
skills.description:
Leaps into the air and slams down twice, dealing damage with each slam.
The second slam launches enemies.
Gains crowd control immunity while using the skill.

skills.name: Sea Anchor
skills.description:
Hurls an anchor in the target direction, dealing damage and slowing enemies.
If the anchor hits terrain, he will be dragged to the contact point, dealing damage and knocking back enemies.
His next Basic Attack will be enhanced with a pulling effect.

skills.name: Ghost Ship
skills.description:
Builds temporary terrain along the outer edge of a cone-shaped area, dealing damage to enemies within it.
Gains crowd control immunity while using the skill.
He can use the skill again to make the temporary terrain disappear early.

skillsZh.name: 海之子
skillsZh.description:
阿塔損失的生命會以殘存血量保留一段時間，期間阿塔造成的所有傷害都會轉化殘存血量為自身生命值。
一段時間後，殘存血量會逐漸扣除。
阿塔普攻造成額外傷害。

skillsZh.name: 踏浪行
skillsZh.description:
跳起後砸向地面兩次，每次都會對敵人造成傷害。
第二次額外造成擊飛效果。
技能施放期間霸體。

skillsZh.name: 定海錨
skillsZh.description:
甩出船錨，對敵人造成傷害和減速效果。
若是船錨接觸到地形，阿塔會移動至接觸位置，對敵人造成傷害和擊退效果。
下次普攻強化，具有拉扯效果。

skillsZh.name: 海靈船
skillsZh.description:
阿塔沿指定扇形區域邊緣建造臨時地形一段時間，對區域內敵人造成傷害。
施放技能過程中免疫控制效果。
再次施放技能可提前讓臨時地形消失。

tips: Build: Blazing Cape, Eye of the Phoenix, Ominous Premonition.
tipsZh: 阿塔（對抗路）：梯度 B，勝率 53.31%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：紅蓮斗篷、不死鳥之眼、不祥徵兆.

patchHistory.change: We're increasing the base Health of some tanks but decreasing their per-level Health growth multiplier so that their Health at max level stays the same.
patchHistory.detail:
We're increasing the base Health of some tanks but decreasing their per-level Health growth multiplier so that their Health at max level stays the same.
We hope that players will be able to tell the difference between the heroes in the early game and fully understand their individual characteristics. This should help them choose the best hero for their team's lineup. We want tanks to soak up damage in the early game without becoming hard to counter in the late game. To that end, we're increasing their base Health while decreasing their Health gain per level.

patchHistory.change: Increased recovery from his passive when dealing damage to heroes.
patchHistory.detail: Although we nerfed the imperil equipment passive in the last season, equipment with that effect has also become suitable for more heroes. By moderately increasing Ata's recovery, we hope to offset the impact of more heroes using this equipment.

patchHistoryZh.change: 提升部分坦克類英雄的基礎生命，降低其隨英雄等級成長的係數，保持滿級後總生命不變
patchHistoryZh.detail:
提升部分坦克類英雄的基礎生命，降低其隨英雄等級成長的係數，保持滿級後總生命不變
我們希望在遊戲早期就能讓玩家區分各英雄間的差異和特點，從而根據陣容需求來選擇自己接下來要操控的英雄。我們希望坦克類英雄能在遊戲早期就承擔吸收傷害的職責，但是又不希望他們在遊戲後期變得難以處理，因此我們適當提升了部分坦克類英雄的基礎生命，並降低了他們每次升級後帶來的生命成長。

patchHistoryZh.change: Increased recovery from his passive when dealing damage to heroes.
patchHistoryZh.detail: Although we nerfed the imperil equipment passive in the last season, equipment with that effect has also become suitable for more heroes. By moderately increasing Ata's recovery, we hope to offset the impact of more heroes using this equipment.

faqs.question: Is Ata good in current season?
faqs.answer: Ata is Tier B Tank with 53.31% win rate, 0.66% pick rate, and 0.06% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Ata build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Blazing Cape, Eye of the Phoenix, Ominous Premonition, Succubus Cloak, Dawnlight, Spikemail.

faqs.question: How to counter Ata?
faqs.answer: Pick Jing, Wukong, Musashi. Strong into Agudo, Meng Ya, Luara.

faqsZh.question: 阿塔 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 阿塔 為 B 梯度，勝率 53.31%、選取 0.66%、禁用 0.06%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 阿塔 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：紅蓮斗篷、不死鳥之眼、不祥徵兆、魔女斗篷、旭日初光、反傷刺甲.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 阿塔？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Jing、Wukong、Musashi。阿塔 克制 Agudo、Meng Ya、Luara。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Agudo, Meng Ya, Luara. Weak into: Jing, Wukong, Musashi.

guide.overview: Ata is a Easy Tank (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 54.1% win rate and 0.7% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Ata — built around Child of the Sea (Tank).
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Tranquility, Dragon's Rage, Blazing Cape, then complete Eye of the Phoenix, Overlord's Platemail, Ominous Premonition. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate for stats that match Ata's Tank kit. Take Execute — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Wavewalking → Sea Anchor → Ghost Ship → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Ghost Ship (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Wavewalking, and Ghost Ship on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Wavewalking → Sea Anchor → Ghost Ship → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Clash Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
guide.teamfight: Engage on enemy carry when your team has follow-up. Body-block skillshots for your marksman.
guide.highRank: Ata sits at Tier B globally (54.1% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.
comparisons: Ata vs Kaizer (Tank, Tier S): Kaizer is 1.6% pick / 51.4% WR. Ata has +2.7% WR vs Kaizer in Camp data. Choose Ata when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Kaizer for Clash Lane comfort.
Ata vs Dun (Tank, Tier S): Dun is 1.5% pick / 52.3% WR. Ata has +1.8% WR vs Dun in Camp data. Choose Ata when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Dun for Clash Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Ata excels into Agudo, Meng Ya, Luara. Avoid blind picking into Jing, Wukong, Musashi without team peel.
